channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Capacity Building for Sustainable Water Management in Tanzania's Rural Areas
item.description: Water experts in Tanzania have undergone specialized training to enhance their skills in monitoring and protecting the quality of water in small reservoirs. This initiative, organized by the Ministry ...

item.title: Modi's New Zealand Visit Amid Trade Deal Backlash and Anti-Migrant Sentiment
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to New Zealand has sparked controversy over a free trade deal with India, which has faced backlash from political parties and individuals. While the agreement prom...

item.title: Nigeria's Football Crisis Threatens National Unity and Security
item.description: The article highlights the systemic failures in Nigeria's football administration, emphasizing how poor management of the sport has led to the nation's absence from the World Cup. It underscores the b...

item.title: Bengal's Communal Past Shapes BJP's Political Strategy
item.description: The article explores how Bengal's historical engagement with communal politics during the colonial era continues to influence contemporary political dynamics, particularly the Bharatiya Janata Party's...

item.title: IOC and ANOCA recognize Mtaka as TOC president after disputed election probe
item.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) and the Association of National Olympic Committees of Africa (ANOCA) have officially recognized Njombe Regional Commissioner Anthony Mtaka as the duly elected...

item.title: Reality TV's Hidden Cost: Ellisha-Jade White's Struggle with Agoraphobia After Love Island
item.description: Ellisha-Jade White, a 31-year-old marketing graduate, recounts her traumatic experience on ITV's Love Island in 2017. Initially hopeful that the show would launch her career in broadcasting, she was t...

item.title: Orlando Pirates' Sipho Chaine breaks PSL clean sheet record
item.description: Former Orlando Pirates goalkeeper Brighton Mhlongo has publicly endorsed Sipho Chaine for the Goalkeeper of the Season award, citing his record-breaking 21 clean sheets this season. Chaine's achieveme...

item.title: Federal Constitutional Court Overturns Previous Orders on Nasla Tower Demolition
item.description: The Federal Constitutional Court (FCC) has recalled expansive Supreme Court orders from 2018 and 2019 that led to the demolition of the 15-storey Nasla Tower in Karachi. The court emphasized that judi...

item.title: Liberal leader Angus Taylor criticizes One Nation and calls for removal of party members
item.description: The article discusses Liberal leader Angus Taylor's public criticism of the One Nation party, labeling it as a 'column of smoke' with 'no credible plan'. Taylor acknowledges the frustration of voters ...

item.title: Calgary Humane Society probes handling of Stampede horse
item.description: The Calgary Humane Society is conducting an investigation into the handling of a horse involved in the Calgary Stampede. The incident has raised concerns about animal welfare practices during the annu...

item.title: Trump's Hypocrisy on Mexico: A Double Standard in Foreign Policy
item.description: The article critiques former U.S. President Donald Trump's inconsistent stance on Mexico, highlighting his past rhetoric of hostility toward the country and his recent claims of concern for Mexican li...

item.title: A Life-Changing Bus Ride to Canberra: The Sliding Doors Moment
item.description: Petronella McGovern's decision to take the Murrays bus to Canberra instead of flying to Perth for a wedding in 1997 led to a life-altering encounter with her future husband, Jamie. This pivotal choice...

item.title: Ekurhuleni Municipal Officials Face Corruption Charges Over Salary Adjustments and Disciplinary Obstruction
item.description: The article details corruption charges against former Ekurhuleni municipal manager Imogen Mashazi, human resources head Linda Gxasheka, and legal advisor Adv Kemi Behari. They are accused of obstructi...

item.title: ICC Trial Chamber Cancels Duterte's July 14 Status Conference; Trial Set for November 30
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) Trial Chamber III has canceled the third status conference of former President Rodrigo Duterte, originally scheduled for July 14, 2026. The ICC stated that the d...

item.title: ANC's Leadership Challenges and South Africa's Political Future
item.description: The article critically examines the African National Congress (ANC)'s ongoing struggles to address South Africa's political crisis. It argues that the party's greatest weakness lies in its failure to ...

item.title: US Election 2024: Trump's landslide win and global geopolitical implications
item.description: The article discusses the outcome of the 2024 US presidential election, where Donald Trump secured a decisive victory. It highlights the significance of his win in shaping global political dynamics, w...

item.title: AMI-tv expands authentic disability representation through accessible programming and original Canadian productions
item.description: AMI-tv has established itself as a pioneering Canadian broadcaster by becoming the world's first television network to offer open-format described video on every program, making its content accessible...

item.title: Expo 2026 Offers Unique Wedding & Celebration Experiences This July
item.description: The article highlights Expo 2026 as a premier destination for wedding and celebration events in July. It outlines twelve compelling reasons to attend, emphasizing the event's diverse offerings such as...

item.title: Mombasa Mob Lynches College Student After False Accusations
item.description: A 24-year-old NITA student, John Joshua Kalage, was brutally beaten to death by a mob in Mombasa after being falsely accused of theft. The incident occurred on June 22 in Marikiti when a group of thie...

item.title: Metropolitan Archbishop Augustine Akubeze's Legacy Of Leadership And Spiritual Guidance
item.description: The Catholic Secretariat of Nigeria announced the passing of Most Rev. Augustine Obiora Akubeze, Metropolitan Archbishop of Benin City, at age 69. His leadership transformed the Archdiocese of Benin C...
